hero.title: Affordable Luxury Fashion
hero.description: Discover Kimhab Ork, where premium womenswear meets accessible pricing. Quality, sustainability, and style in every collection.

features.title: Why Choose Kimhab Ork?
features.feature_1_desc: Premium quality womenswear at prices that celebrate accessibility and value.
features.feature_2_desc: Responsibly sourced fabrics that minimize environmental impact without compromising quality.
features.feature_3_desc: Fair labor practices and transparent supply chain management throughout our operations.
features.feature_4_desc: Versatile, classic silhouettes with modern details that remain relevant season after season.

learn_more.title: Learn More
learn_more.card_1_desc: Discover our story, values, and commitment to affordable luxury fashion for modern women.
learn_more.card_2_desc: Comprehensive care instructions for all fabric types to preserve your pieces for years.
learn_more.card_3_desc: Learn about our commitment to sustainability, ethical sourcing, and responsible production.

cta.title: Experience Affordable Luxury
cta.description: Discover premium womenswear that doesn't compromise on quality, sustainability, or price. Welcome to Kimhab Ork.

about.hero_desc: Kimhab Ork reimagines womenswear by combining exquisite design, premium quality materials, and sustainable practices at prices that celebrate accessibility.
about.story_para_1: Kimhab Ork was born from a simple belief: premium fashion should be accessible to everyone. Founded with a vision to bridge the gap between high fashion and everyday elegance, we create womenswear that empowers women to express themselves without compromise.
about.story_para_2: Every piece in our collection is thoughtfully designed with the modern woman in mind. We draw inspiration from contemporary style, timeless elegance, and the diverse needs of women who refuse to choose between quality, design, and affordability.
about.story_para_3: Our name reflects our commitment: Kimhab carries the essence of Khmer culture and heritage, while Ork symbolizes new beginnings and growth. Together, they represent our vision of creating something beautiful that resonates across cultures and generations.

values.value_1_desc: We believe in creating pieces that last. Every garment is carefully crafted with premium materials and attention to detail.
values.value_2_desc: Luxury fashion should not be exclusive. We make premium womenswear affordable without compromising on design or craftsmanship.
values.value_3_desc: Our commitment to the environment is reflected in our material choices and production practices.
values.value_4_desc: We design for confident, modern women who value both style and substance. Every collection celebrates femininity and strength.

about.faq_01_content: We source the finest fabrics and materials, including organic cotton, sustainable silk, and responsibly-sourced textiles that feel luxurious and last longer.
about.faq_02_content: Our collections focus on versatile, classic silhouettes with modern details. Pieces that work today and remain relevant for years to come.
about.faq_03_content: We partner with manufacturers who prioritize fair wages, safe working conditions, and environmental responsibility throughout our supply chain.
about.faq_04_content: Quality womenswear at accessible prices. We believe you shouldn't have to compromise on quality or pay luxury prices for great fashion.
about.cta_desc: Explore our thoughtfully curated womenswear collections designed for the modern woman who values quality, style, and sustainability.

contact.hero_desc: Have questions about our collections? We're here to help. Reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.faq_01_content: We offer standard shipping (5-7 business days) and express shipping (2-3 business days). Shipping times may vary depending on your location.
contact.faq_02_content: We offer a 30-day return policy on all unused items in original condition. Please contact our customer service team for details on how to initiate a return.
contact.faq_03_content: Yes, we offer custom tailoring services for our premium collections. Please reach out to us to discuss your specific requirements.
contact.faq_04_title: How can I track my order?
contact.faq_04_content: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can use this to monitor your package's journey.

care_guides.hero_desc: Preserve the beauty and longevity of your Kimhab Ork pieces with our comprehensive care instructions. High-quality materials deserve proper care.
care_guides.intro_desc: High-quality materials require specific care to preserve their integrity over time. Specific cleaning and care instructions are present on the product label inside each garment. For general advice, follow our dedicated guides for each fabric type.
care_guides.care_01_desc: Cotton is a natural plant-derived fiber that is lightweight, versatile, and breathable. We recommend gentle hand washing at 30°C or gentle dry cleaning. Preferably, turn the garment inside out and ensure the protection or removal of any accessories.
care_guides.care_02_desc: Silk is a natural fiber of animal origin, obtained from the filament of the silkworm. It has a smooth, lustrous appearance pleasant to the touch. We recommend gentle dry cleaning and reverse ironing, ensuring the protection and removal of any accessories.
care_guides.care_03_desc: Denim is a durable cotton fiber material. We recommend gentle washing at 30°C, preferably turning the garment inside out and ensuring the protection or removal of any accessories.
care_guides.care_04_desc: Cashmere is a fine fiber of animal origin with a silky, soft, and woolly hand feel. We recommend gentle hand washing or delicate dry cleaning, ensuring the protection and removal of any accessories.
care_guides.care_05_desc: Calfskin is soft yet durable leather of animal origin. We advise cleaning leather with a soft, dry cloth and contacting a specialized leather treatment center.
care_guides.storage_1: Store garments in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight
care_guides.storage_2: Use breathable garment bags or cotton storage
care_guides.storage_3: Ensure proper ventilation to prevent moisture accumulation
care_guides.storage_4: Keep away from perfumes and creams that may stain
care_guides.washing_1: Always check the care label first for specific instructions
care_guides.washing_2: Turn garments inside out before washing
care_guides.washing_3: Use cold water when possible to preserve color
care_guides.washing_4: Avoid over-washing to extend garment lifespan
care_guides.drying_1: Air dry whenever possible instead of machine drying
care_guides.drying_2: Lay flat or hang in a well-ventilated area
care_guides.drying_3: Avoid direct heat sources and intense sunlight
care_guides.drying_4: Remove from drying immediately to prevent wrinkles
care_guides.ironing_1: Use low to medium heat depending on fabric type
care_guides.ironing_2: Always use a pressing cloth between iron and delicate fabrics
care_guides.ironing_3: Iron reverse side of printed or embellished garments
care_guides.ironing_4: Iron while garment is slightly damp for best results
care_guides.stain_1_desc: Address stains as soon as possible for better results. Blot the stain rather than rubbing to avoid spreading it further.
care_guides.stain_2_desc: Always test any cleaning solution on a hidden area of the garment before applying it to the visible stain.
care_guides.stain_3_desc: Use gentle, circular motions when treating stains. Avoid harsh scrubbing that can damage the fabric fibers.
care_guides.stain_4_desc: For stubborn or valuable pieces, consider professional dry cleaning services to ensure proper stain removal.

responsibility.hero_desc: We are committed to sustainable and ethical practices in every aspect of our business, from material sourcing to production and packaging.
responsibility.commitment_para_1: At Kimhab Ork, we believe that sustainability isn't just a buzzword—it's a responsibility we take seriously. Every decision we make, from the materials we choose to the factories we partner with, is guided by our commitment to protect our planet and the people who make our clothes.
responsibility.commitment_para_2: We understand that the fashion industry has historically had significant environmental and social impacts. That's why we've made the conscious choice to operate differently, creating premium womenswear that's beautiful, ethical, and sustainable.
responsibility.pillar_1_desc: We prioritize organic, sustainable, and responsibly-sourced fabrics including organic cotton, GOTS-certified materials, recycled fibers, and innovative sustainable alternatives.
responsibility.pillar_2_desc: Our manufacturing partners are carefully selected and regularly audited to ensure fair wages, safe working conditions, and compliance with international labor standards.
responsibility.pillar_3_desc: We work to minimize our environmental footprint through efficient production, sustainable packaging, and responsible waste management throughout our supply chain.
responsibility.practice_1_desc: We source organic cotton from GOTS-certified suppliers, sustainable silk from responsible producers, recycled materials to reduce waste, and innovative alternatives like Tencel and linen that minimize environmental impact.
responsibility.practice_2_desc: Our manufacturers are selected based on their commitment to fair wages, safe working conditions, proper waste management, and environmental responsibility. We conduct regular audits to ensure compliance.
responsibility.practice_3_desc: We use recyclable and biodegradable packaging materials, minimize plastic use, and optimize shipping sizes to reduce our carbon footprint. All packaging is designed to be reusable or easily recyclable.
responsibility.practice_4_desc: We believe in full transparency with our customers. We regularly publish information about our suppliers, certifications, and progress toward sustainability goals.
responsibility.cta_desc: By choosing Kimhab Ork, you're not just buying beautiful womenswear—you're supporting sustainable fashion and ethical manufacturing practices.
